title: Create notification

posts.author: f2yez (Fayez Bdair)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

I tried to send a notification to specific user using (https://monday.com/developers/v2#mutations-section-notifications-create)

But I want to ask if I can make a notification seems like sent from APP instead of user ?

Screen Shot 2021-03-31 at 3.33.15 PM1308×280 34.9 KB

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @f2yez!

Sadly at this time I’m afraid that the notifications will need to be tied to a user profile.

However, you can create a “dummy” user in the account who will essentially be sending out these notifications?

Could something like this help?

posts.author: f2yez (Fayez Bdair)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks @Helen I will try it.

posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
